full_text:
Xie Gai (Wenyi)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xie Gai, styledWenyi, was born in Nanyang. So famous for his scholarship, considered too valuable to be allowed to leave the court. Xie Gai was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
